'''Dap Nechel''' was an alien engineer onboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] who enjoyed watching [[B'shingh]] matches between [[Celia Durasha]] and [[Detien Kaileel]]. When he learned that Detien had smuggled weapons to members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] he aided Detien and Celia's escape from the ''Princess''.
